High School Sweethearts
Hillsdale's Go-To Team
Meet The Team

George & Christine Chicolo

Husband & Wife · Hillsdale, NJ · Licensed NJ & NY

We're George and Christine — high school sweethearts turned Hillsdale's go-to real estate team. As a husband-and-wife duo raising three amazing daughters, we bring a deeply personal, family-first approach to everything we do.

Whether it's helping someone find their forever home, guiding a business owner into their first commercial space, or walking through how to transform a room before listing — they call us. And we love that.

Between George and Christine's shared background in sales, interior design, and small commercial spaces, we bring a perspective most agents simply don't have. The Chicolo Group is rooted in trust, driven by hustle, and guided by heart.

🤝 Relationship-Driven

Our Expertise

Two people. One powerhouse team.

George and Christine each bring something distinct. Together, there's almost nothing they can't handle.

Bergen County · Residential Market
George Chicolo

The market expert
who fights for you.

George knows Bergen County's market inside and out — pricing strategy, timing, negotiation, and how to position a deal so his clients win. Licensed in NJ and NY.

The design eye
that changes everything.

What We Do
Everything you need,
covered.

Residential, commercial, design — we handle more than most agents because our clients need more than most agents offer.

Residential
Buying a Home

We'll help you find the right neighborhood, not just the right house. George knows these streets and which blocks you actually want to be on.

Residential
Selling Your Home

Strategic pricing, strong marketing, and a shared design eye for staging. We position your home to attract the right buyers at the right price.

Commercial · NJ & NY
Commercial Spaces

Small offices, retail shops, boutique commercial — NJ and NY. We help business owners find and build out spaces that actually work for them.

Design
Design Consultation

George and Christine's interior design background means you get a real eye on every space — before you buy, list, or build out.

Network
Trusted Connections

Need a lender, inspector, contractor, or attorney? We know the best people locally and we're never shy about making the right introduction.

Residential · Commercial
Relocation & Advice

New to Bergen County or figuring out your next move? We'll tell you what it's really like to live and do business here — no fluff.

Client Reviews
What our clients actually say.

Real people. Real experiences from real transactions in Bergen County.

★★★★★

"I had the great fortune of serendipitously meeting George Chicolo III while trick-or-treating. George immediately impressed me with his warm, friendly demeanor and knowledge of the local real estate market. He helped me to find a new home for my family, while also being extremely patient with our months long search. Once we found our new home, George listed our current home and was able to really show his extraordinary sales skills! George brings his whole self and more to serving his clients. I would've never tackled this huge life-changing event for my family without him."

Why The Chicolo Group

The kind of team
you actually want.

There are plenty of agents in Bergen County. Here's what makes working with George and Christine different.

1
They'll tell you the truth

Even if it's not what you want to hear. You'll never get a sugar-coated answer just to keep the deal moving. That honesty saves clients time, money, and real stress.

2
Two perspectives, one team

George brings the sales instincts, market knowledge, and negotiation. Christine brings an added layer of design vision and detail orientation. Together, nothing gets missed.

3
They actually know everyone

George and Christine are plugged into this community — and across the state line. Agents, business owners, contractors, local leaders. They're never shy about making the right introduction.

4
They treat you like family

After closing, they're still the first call many clients make. Not because they have to be. Because that's just who they are.

★★★★★

George is one of the best there is in the business! He treats everyone like family and truly cares about those he works with. I would trust George again and again.

A
Alen Baharyan
Buyer & Seller · Bergen County, NJ
We Live Here Too

Why people love Bergen County

We're not just working this market — we're part of it.

🏫
Top-Rated Schools

The Pascack Valley district is consistently ranked among the best in NJ. It's the first thing families ask about — and for good reason.

🚂
NYC Access

Train to the city, easy highway access. Real suburban living without giving up the convenience of being close to Manhattan.

🍕
Local Spots We Love

From the best diners to hidden pizza gems — George and Christine can tell you exactly where to go before you even move in.

🏘️
Real Community

Block parties, local leagues, neighbors who actually know each other. People put down roots here and stay. That says everything.

How It Works

Simple process.
Zero surprises.

No overwhelm, no mystery. Here's exactly what working with us looks like.

01
Real Conversation

We start with an honest call. No pressure, no pitch. Just listening to what you need — residential, commercial, or something in between.

02
Clear Strategy

We map out the right approach in plain English. You'll always know the plan — and why we recommend it.

03
We Go to Work

George and Christine handle the details, negotiations, and connections. You stay informed without being overwhelmed.

04
Closed & Still Here

We close the deal and stick around. Need a referral six months later? We pick up the phone. That's just the standard.
